#  How can I keep track of emailed drawings? 
Any emails you send out of the emails tab using the orange **Email** button on the right side of the page will be documented in the "Emails" sub tab of the drawing view page.
![Track Emailed Documents](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d2cc71fd4f698e3b134110010a392381/c83441f5431d2d39e286c737a2ffa5c5/track-emailed-documents.png?fm=webp&h=620)
